name: Fried Sweet Plantains
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the plantains.
2. Cut them into 1/2-inch slices.
3. Heat the vegetable oil in a large sauté pan over medium heat until hot but not smoking.
4. Fry the plantain slices until golden brown, turning occasionally.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Remove from the oil when cooked through and drain on paper towels.
